title: EvolutionaryScale GenerationConfig
description: Schema for the `GenerationConfig` object that controls iterative masked sampling for the EvolutionaryScale Forge ESM3 generate endpoint.

track.description: Which ESM3 track to generate. Sequence is the most common; structure and function tracks require the multimodal model checkpoints.

num_steps.description: Number of iterative masked-sampling steps. Lower values are faster; higher values produce more refined outputs.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. 0.0 yields greedy decoding; 1.0 matches the trained distribution; higher values increase diversity.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling cutoff. Samples from the smallest set of tokens whose cumulative probability is at least `top_p`.

schedule.description: Decoding schedule controlling how many positions are unmasked per step.

invalid_ids.description: Token IDs the sampler must never emit. Useful for constraining amino acid alphabets or forbidding rare structure tokens.

condition_on_coordinates_only.description: If true, condition only on coordinates (ignore sequence tokens) when generating other tracks.
